Asaf..Chest: "Pressure and burning of the sternum." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight." "Stitches in chest." "Single, violent stitches from within outward, at short intervals."
Asaf..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: "Pulsation in pit of stomach; perceptible to sight and touch." "Pulsations after eating."
Asaf..Extremities: inflammation of cartilages with tumefaction and purple skin, stitching pains and dropsy, ulcerations and fistulous openings.
Asaf..Generalities: Most complaints come on during rest and are better by slow motion.
Asaf..Head: All over the head there is stitching pain, but in the frontal eminence, in the temples, there is a sensation as if a nail or plug were driven in, and most of the pains seem to bore, as if they extended from the bone to the surface, and hence are said to be from within out.
Asaf..Mind: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
Asaf..Mind, irritability: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
Asaf..Rectum: These patients are afflicted with diarrhoea from the slightest indigestion, after any indiscretion in diet, a painful watery diarrhoea.
Asaf..Skin: Old scars turn purple, threaten to suppurate, take on a venous aspect, become painful and turn black. Ulcers form at the site of old scars in old syphilitic patients and sometimes in psoric patients.
Asaf..Stomach: In the stomach troubles, if you have ever seen a typical case of Asa foetida, you will wonder where all the air comes from; it comes up in volumes.
Asaf..Stomach, eructations: "Eructations; smelling like garlic; tasting rancid, sharp or putrid."
Asaf..Abdomen, pain: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic.
Asaf..Generalities, faintness: they go off almost from no cause into fainting; from a close room, from excitement, from any disturbance; sometimes cramps come on, but more especially fainting.
Asaf..Generalities, pain: They are subject to stitching pains from the bone to the surface; that is, from within out.
Asaf..Generalities, side: Shooting, stitching, tearing pains, under left frontal eminence.
Asaf..Clinical: Syphilis sometimes produces this kind of condition. Vascular disturbances in the body; periostitis, necrosis, induration of glands, nerve syphilis and head pains.
Asaf..Heart & Circulation, heart: The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
Asaf..Abdomen: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic. The diarrhoea is more or less troublesome.
Asaf..Heart & Circulation: it shows more or less cardiac disturbance and venous stasis. The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
Asaf..Face: Those cases that come into your office with puffed, venous, purple faces; they have an appearance of plethora; the face looks puffed, bloated and dropsical at times; it is a dark red, dusky face.
Asaf..Head, pain: This stitching pain is sometimes described as if a nail or plug were driven into the head. These nervous headaches are syphilitic hysterical or scrofulous; hysterical pains described as rending, tearing, stitching.
Asaf..Stool: "Liquid stools of most disgusting smell." "Blackish-brown papescent offensive stools, which relieve."
Asaf..Throat: a sensation of a ball rising in the throat, such as occurs in globus hystericus; choking, must constantly swallow.
Asaf..Generalities, pain, pressing: "Pressing, cutting, stitching pains." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight."
Asaf..Generalities, bones: The bone pains that are felt in the head are sometimes very distressing. Old syphilitic bone pains in the head, stitching, penetrating. It seems where there are lumps and nodules, about the head, this medicine seems to burry things.
